issues.description: TrashFromHand is mandatory in DSL but card text says 'You may trash' — should be optional. Use optional:true or restructure with conditional logic.
SearchDeck filter missing 'type' constraint. Card specifies 'GERMA' type; filter must include {"type":"GERMA"} to match 'reveal up to 1 card with a type including GERMA'.

SearchDeck does not support the 'place rest at bottom in any order' mechanic. This requires a multi-step resolution: reveal up to 1 GERMA, add to hand, then order remaining 2 cards at deck bottom. Standard SearchDeck action cannot handle card ordering.
Rest action should target the card itself (the Stage with this ability), not 'Self' in the context of an activated ability. Clarify scope or use card identity.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may trash 1 card from your hand and rest this Stage: Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "GERMA" and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
